docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,321.30 FILED BY BOTAITIS, NICK CARPET CONTRACTORS INC. AS TO DEFENDANT BROWN, RICHARD ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-26-1998 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
CERTIFIED MAIL TO RICHARD BROWN RETURNED SIGNED.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BOTAITIS, NICK CARPET CONTRACTORS INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BROWN, RICHARD $1,321.30 PRINCIPAL, $26.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,347.30 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT BROWN, RICHARD HEARING SET FOR OCT-15-1998 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF OCT-15-1998, GRANTED

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BOTAITIS, NICK CARPET CONTRACTORS INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BROWN, RICHARD $1,321.30 PRINCIPAL, $26.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,347.30, $150 PAID IN OPEN COURT. $150 EVERY 15TH OF EACH MONTH THRU 3/99. $600 FINAL PAYMENT ON 4/15/99. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
